title: Tislelizumab plus chemotherapy vs placebo plus chemotherapy as first-line treatment of advanced gastric or gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma: patient-reported outcomes in the Asian subgroup of the RATIONALE-305 study.
abstract: This study examined the patient-reported outcomes (PROs) in the Asian subgroup of patients from the RATIONALE-305 (NCT03777657) trial.
